title: heliotropium glabrum
intro: Heliotropium glabrum, also known as smooth heliotrope, is a flowering plant species native to the Americas. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Heliotropium glabrum include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as its potential to lower fever and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
